name: Mecademic Meca500 initial Modified-DH model
source_note: Initial MDH values exported from the public pybotics predefined mecademic_meca500 model. Verify against official Mecademic documentation and real robot TCP readings before using for final experiments.

units.length: millimeters in file, converted to meters in simulation

validation_required: Compare FK zero pose with official zero-position CAD.
Query real Meca500 joint/TCP pose at known joint angles.
Adjust base frame and flange frame definitions until FK and real TCP agree.
